rationale: A PowerShell command (A0) was executed with obfuscation (DER-001) by the Administrator. Immediately following this, the lsass.exe process (EV-003, EV-004) accessed the PowerShell process with '0x1000' (PROCESS_VM_READ) and '0x1478' (PROCESS_VM_READ | PROCESS_VM_WRITE | PROCESS_QUERY_INFORMATION | PROCESS_DUP_HANDLE) granted access. This behavior is highly indicative of credential dumping, as lsass.exe is a critical process for authentication and its memory contains credentials.
